guide.title: Discover the themes
guide.description: Click on the top right to switch between a more formal and a more playful mode. Try both!

hero.headline: I build digital experiences that make you say
hero.description: Front-end developer. I craft animated, fast and accessible interfaces — for companies and teams who want products that feel like magic.
hero.awards: This site won at the CSS Design Awards

services.title: What I do
services.description: No templates. I build bespoke interfaces, crafted down to the detail — from the first pixel to the last animation.

0.title: Animation & micro-interactions
0.text: Living interfaces at 60fps with Framer Motion and GSAP: transitions, scroll-driven effects and details that guide the user.

1.title: Performance & SEO
1.text: Optimized Next.js, green Core Web Vitals, lazy-loading and fast rendering. Fast for users, visible on Google.

2.title: Accessibility & responsive
2.text: WCAG, keyboard navigation, proper contrast and fluid layouts that truly work on every screen.

3.title: Scalable code
3.text: TypeScript, reusable components and design systems in Tailwind. Clean code a team can maintain.

projects.title: Some of my projects
projects.description: Real sites for real businesses and lab-grown concepts. No templates: every pixel is hand-written.

watermelon.name: Watermelon Studio
watermelon.description: My web design agency: bold, bespoke digital experiences, awarded at the CSS Design Awards.

rachele.name: Rachele Dolcezze
rachele.description: Artisan pastry shop in Travedona Monate: a soft, mouth-watering showcase for handmade sweets.

silvana.name: Silvana Barbato
silvana.description: Interior designer in Varese. A site as clean and elegant as the spaces she designs.

lafontana.name: La Fontana
lafontana.description: Architecture and engineering firm in Monza, since 1963: one partner, from idea to construction site.

inkhaus.name: Inkhaus
inkhaus.description: Milan tattoo studio: dark, bold and dripping with ink like its flash sheets.

about.title: About me
about.description: Freelance front-end developer with a strong focus on design, user experience, and code quality. I collaborate with dynamic teams to create modern and engaging solutions.
about.quote: The best interface is the one that fades away, but leaves a mark.

timeline.title: Coverzen
timeline.description: Freelance front-end dev for an internal product for insurance brokers.
